ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wire_containers" (
  "model_no" TEXT /* Primary model number for the wire container */,
  "model_no_1" TEXT /* Secondary model number for the wire container */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wire container */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the wire container */,
  "overall_size" TEXT /* Overall dimensions of the wire container (Width x Depth x Height) */,
  "mesh_size_side" TEXT /* Mesh size on the side of the wire container */,
  "base" TEXT /* Base dimensions of the wire container */,
  "optional_shelf_product_no" TEXT /* Product number for the optional spring-loaded shelf */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the wire container */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the wire container */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wire container in stock */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to construct the wire container */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wire container */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the container was manufactured */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the container */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the container */,
  "safety_standards" TEXT /* Compliance with safety standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_containers_optional_shelf_product_no FOREIGN KEY ("optional_shelf_product_no") REFERENCES accessories ("product_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the sales channel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the sales channel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for the sales channel (if applicable) */,
  "open_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours for the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "model_no" TEXT /* Model number of the wire container */,
  "base_price" TEXT /* Base price of the wire container */,
  "promotion_discount" TEXT /* Discount amount for promotions */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the promotion is effective */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Sales channel for which the price is effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the promotion ends */,
  "minimum_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to apply the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_model_no FOREIGN KEY ("model_no") REFERENCES wire_containers ("model_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "model_no" TEXT /* Model number of the wire container */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wire container currently in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the last restock occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the containers */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next restock */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date when the last unit was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_no FOREIGN KEY ("model_no") REFERENCES wire_containers ("model_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who placed the order */,
  "model_no" TEXT /* Model number of the wire container ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wire container ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, fulfilled, shipped) */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Sales channel through which the order was placed */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_model_no FOREIGN KEY ("model_no") REFERENCES wire_containers ("model_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_channel_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer's preferred sales channel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer for loyalty */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessories" (
  "accessory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessory */,
  "product_no" TEXT /* Product number of the accessory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accessory */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the accessory */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the accessory */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the accessory */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the accessory was manufactured */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the accessory */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the accessory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom configuration */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who configured the wire container */,
  "model_no" TEXT /* Model number of the wire container */,
  "mesh_size" TEXT /* Selected mesh size for the wire container */,
  "base_type" TEXT /* Selected base type for the wire container */,
  "accessory_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the selected accessory */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name given to the custom configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was made */,
  "configuration_price" TEXT /* Additional price for the custom configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_configurations_accessory_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessory_id") REFERENCES accessories ("accessory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_configurations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_configurations_model_no FOREIGN KEY ("model_no") REFERENCES wire_containers ("model_no")
)
